headline: Altria Q1 Earnings on the Horizon: Essential Insights for Investors
summary: MO's first-quarter results are likely to show modest growth, as pricing strength and cost control offset volume declines in smokeable products.

headline: J. M. Smucker’s Quarterly Earnings Preview: What You Need to Know
summary: J. M. Smucker is all geared up to post its FY2026 Q4 earnings shortly, and analysts anticipate a double-digit profit boost.
